name: Nutty Chocolate Stars
recipeIngredient: 1 package Milk Chocolate Stars or Kisses
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease cookie sheets.
In a large bowl, cream together the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
Blend in the egg and vanilla extract.
Stir in the oats, flour, and baking soda until well combined.
Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls and roll each ball in nuts.
Place the nut-studded cookies on the prepared sheets.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 1 minute on the sheets before transferring to wire racks.
Store tightly covered.
